hooks.command: ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/session_start.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.codex/hooks/session_start.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/session_start.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/session_start.ts"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/user_prompt.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.codex/hooks/user_prompt.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/user_prompt.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/user_prompt.ts"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_tool.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.codex/hooks/pre_tool.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_tool.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/pre_tool.ts"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/terminal.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.codex/hooks/terminal.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/terminal.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/terminal.ts"; fi

ROOT="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/stop.ts" ]; then SEARCH="$PWD"; while [ "$SEARCH" != "/" ]; do if [ -f "$SEARCH/.codex/hooks/stop.ts" ]; then ROOT="$SEARCH"; break; fi; SEARCH="$(dirname "$SEARCH")"; done; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" ]; then NODE_ENV=development node "$ROOT/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs" "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/stop.ts"; else NODE_ENV=development npx --yes tsx "$ROOT/.codex/hooks/stop.ts"; fi
